passives.name: Effervescence
passives.effects: Gain {{as|{{fd|1.2}}% '''bonus''' attack speed}} per 1% {{stil|heal and shield power}}.

passives.name: Peppermint
passives.effects: Basic attacks [[on-hit]] cause the {{tt|most wounded|Lowest health percent}} and nearest allied champion to be {{tip|heal|healed}} for {{pp|15 to 45}} {{as|(+ 10% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ 7% AP)}}.

effects_structured.raw: Gain 1.2% bonus attack speed per 1% heal and shield power.
Basic attacks heal the most wounded and nearest allied champion for 15–45 (+10% bonus AD) (+7% AP).

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Effervescence converts heal and shield power into bonus attack speed at 1.2% bonus attack speed per 1% heal and shield power.
Player-visible behavior: Peppermint resolves on each basic attack on-hit event and heals an allied champion rather than the struck enemy target.
Peppermint ally targeting prioritizes lowest-health-percent and nearest ally selection; outgoing-heal modifiers from mode rules (for example ARAM: Mayhem) apply downstream.
